description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image with a global before_script running npm install and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define three jobs: a lint job (in the default test stage) that executes npm run lint; a test job (also in the test stage) that runs npm run coverage; and a pages job (in a deploy stage) that runs npm install then npm run docs:build, publishes the public/ folder as an artifact, reuses the node_modules/ cache, and is limited to the master branch. Ensure the pipeline has no services and uses the default stages ordering.
